backend/main.mo: Main actor defining ContactData and Inquiry types, storing a single location (Indore address with coordinates), and exposing query/update methods for contact data and inquiry submission with validation.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state with dual north/south locations into new single-location structure, preserving inquiries and using north location data as the default.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of north/south location dropdown and replacement with single embedded map for the Indore address location.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Urban Rasoi Dhaba application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base configuration with CSS custom properties defining color scheme, spacing, and theming variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Bootstrap CSS/JS, Google Fonts (Poppins, Merriweather), jQuery, and the React application with title 'Urban Rasoi Dhaba'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home, About, Menu, Contact, and Category pages wrapped in a Layout with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying cafe story, interior image, and three feature cards (Crafted with Love, Community Hub, Quality First) in a responsive two-column layout.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact component with embedded Google Maps iframe showing single Indore location, contact info cards (phone, email, address, hours), and inquiry form using React Query hooks for data fetching and submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice and caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters based on current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component displaying the cafe's main banner with background image, title, tagline, and call-to-action buttons that scroll to menu and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu component displaying three categories (Beverages, Meals, Desserts) with images, icons, and item listings including names, prices, and descriptions in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Navigation bar component with scroll-aware styling, Bootstrap-based responsive menu, and TanStack Router links to Home, About, Menu, Categories, and Contact pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactData.ts: React Query hook that fetches contact data from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is initialized and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive Internet Identity authentication hook and provider that manages login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting customer inquiries to the backend, invalidating the inquiries cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a Desi Dhaba theme with custom CSS variables, color palette, typography (Poppins and Merriweather fonts), decorative patterns, button styles, and card components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying the dhaba's story, mission, and values with hero section, image galleries, and descriptive content about Urban Rasoi Dhaba's heritage and philosophy.
frontend/src/pages/Category.tsx: Category browsing page that filters and displays different food establishment types (dhaba, cafe, restaurant, street-food) with jQuery fade animations and clickable category filter buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form for submitting inquiries, displays contact information (phone, email, address, hours) using custom hooks, and embeds a Google Maps location view.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage featuring a full-screen hero section with background image, welcome content, featured menu items, customer testimonials, and call-to-action buttons linking to menu and contact pages.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Menu page displaying categorized food items (breakfast, thali, curries, beverages) with images, names, prices, and descriptions organized in a grid layout.
frontend/src/styles/dhaba-theme.css: Custom CSS theme file defining dhaba-specific styling including rustic textures, traditional borders, menu item hover effects, category filter buttons, image overlays, decorative elements, price tags, and loading spinners.
frontend/src/utils/jquery-interactions.t: Provides jQuery-based utility functions for smooth scrolling, fade-in animations on scroll, navbar background changes, counter animations, and filter toggle effects.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Empty Tailwind configuration file (project uses Bootstrap + CSS instead of Tailwind per architectural notes).
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a multi-page responsive Indian dhaba-themed website with React/Node.js stack, Bootstrap styling, jQuery interactions, and category filtering functionality across Home, About, Menu, Contact, and Category pages.
